_doc: Pi-pinned snapshot of 2 read-only session navigation RPC commands (get_fork_messages + get_last_assistant_text). Sprint 6h₄a Phase 4.11. Used by tests/pi_parity/test_phase_4_11_strict_superset.py.
_p_293_note: ADR-0074 carry-forward roster estimated lines 563-566 / 568-571 for the two handlers; Sprint 6h₄a W0 fetched the Pi source at SHA 734e08e and verified the actual case sites at 591-594 / 596-599. Forward-fix recorded in ADR-0075; ADR-0074 amend acknowledges the drift.

get_fork_messages.body: const messages = session.getUserMessagesForForking(); return success(id, 'get_fork_messages', { messages });

get_last_assistant_text.body: const text = session.getLastAssistantText(); return success(id, 'get_last_assistant_text', { text });

_extractUserMessageText._doc: Private helper called by getUserMessagesForForking. Walks UserMessage.content; filters c.type==='text'; joins .text; returns ''.

pi_get_user_messages_for_forking_algorit: 1. entries = sessionManager.getEntries() — Aelix maps to await self._session.get_entries() (async)
pi_get_last_assistant_text_algorithm: 3. text = ''; for each content block in lastAssistant.content: if content.type === 'text': text += content.text

fork_point_shape._doc: Pi inline anonymous type — Aelix introduces ForkPointInfo frozen dataclass for clarity

fields.text: string — concatenated TextContent from user message (Pi `_extractUserMessageText` output)

aelix_current_state.session_get_entries: EXISTS — async (Pi sync sessionManager.getEntries → Aelix async Session.get_entries)
aelix_current_state.message_entry_class: EXISTS at session/entries.py:30-37 — .id / .message / .type='message' matches Pi shape exactly
aelix_current_state.rpc_command_types: EXIST as DEFERRED stubs at rpc_types.py:269-281
aelix_current_state.harness_methods: MISSING — Sprint 6h₄a adds 2 new harness methods + 1 helper

deferred_to_sprint_6h_4_b: rebindSession seam — P-126 Sprint 6f carry-forward (multi-sprint accumulation)
Pi HTML export visual fidelity carry-forward from Sprint 6h₃
